channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 29th June
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure footway aburt level difference due to overriding 1400x2800x55 mm stats required (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 29th June
item.description:
2 HOUR GIVE AND TAKE MAKE SAFE DAMAGED footway with x 6 barriers and an x2 footway closure boards from line to line (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -FW6 Potholes problem, 29th June
item.description:
Pothole FW 300x300x60mm approx Standard TM with temp FW closure Stats (FW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 29th June
item.description:
Pothole CW 600x500x60mm approx Road closure X 4 NSD (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unpermitted roadworks problem, 29th June
item.description:
Email received 27/06/2026 - copy attached. Customer reports: Kingsley Gardens - GL51 7TE closed due to water works. Maps showing Tennyson road junction with A40 closed but not Kingsley Garden (access only). There are bollards at end of Kingsley Gardens, so no through access. Sat Nav taking traffic down Kingsley Gardens to avoid junction. Traffic having to reverse or cut across cycle way/ footpath to access A40.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Barriers used around collapse wall ready for collection ref 70015039, 29th June
item.description:
Rose Farm Stockwell Lane Woodmancote GL529QE

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stockwell Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 29th June
item.description:
Claim under their Buildings Insurance Policy on 21/08/2026 following the appearance of cracks in the property.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lorry load of material on public right of way, 29th June
item.description:
Overnight building waste dumped, small lorry load. Blocking ROW. Sign states "Wellington Stores", possibly a renovation?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A38, Norton, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 29th June
item.description:
